style.medium: photorealistic 3d render, editorial minimal still-life, shallow depth of field

palette.accent: #9cba90 dusted, restrained phosphor green - muted, NOT neon, soft glow only

style.lighting: low-key cinematic, single soft key light, soft volumetric haze, deep shadows
style.composition: one clear subject, vast empty dark negative space, generous margins
style.forbidden: no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no brand marks, no people, no faces, no clutter, no busy detail

images.alt: a phosphor-green sprout growing from a crack in dark concrete, alone in empty darkness
images.scene: a single small phosphor-green sprout growing out of a crack in dark concrete, alone in vast empty darkness

images.alt: a green-lit anchor planted in dark stone while faint grey social bubbles drift away into haze
images.scene: a glowing green anchor embedded in dark stone while faint grey speech-bubble shapes drift away and dissolve into haze

images.alt: small green light points joined by thin lines converging into one owned bright node
images.scene: a small constellation of green light points joined by thin lines, all converging into one brighter owned node on a dark field

images.alt: one green-lit desk lamp glowing over an empty dark desk, vast negative space
images.scene: a single green-lit desk lamp glowing over an empty dark minimal desk, vast negative space around it

images.alt: three thin green channels of light flowing into one funnel over dark ground
images.scene: three thin streams of green light flowing down into one simple funnel shape over dark ground, minimal

images.alt: one green gear turning in darkness while faint dim gears sit stopped around it
images.scene: a single luminous green gear turning quietly in darkness, a few faint dim grey gears stopped around it

images.scene: a single sheet of paper glowing green with real depth and texture, rising above a flat sea of identical grey sheets fading into darkness

images.scene: a cracked grey wall of stacked identical blocks, one block replaced by a luminous green hand-carved stone

images.scene: a quiet green lighthouse beam cutting through dark fog over a still dark sea, minimal

images.scene: a single green-lit cornerstone block being set as the foundation of a dark minimal architectural structure

images.scene: a blueprint drawn in thin green light on dark ground, one clear path through it highlighted brighter

images.scene: a small green-glowing coin resting on a solid dark architectural base, faint glow, lots of empty space

images.scene: an open green-lit doorway in a dark wall with a clear path leading out, suggesting the freedom to leave

images.scene: a set of modular dark building blocks with glowing green edges, neatly assembled, minimal, on dark ground

images.scene: a single key of green light resting beside a dark portable case, lots of empty dark space

images.scene: two pedestals in darkness - a crowded bright busy rented stage versus a solitary calm green-lit owned platform, minimal

images.scene: a small green-lit house standing on its own dark ground in the foreground, a faint single apartment window glowing in a distant grey tower behind

images.scene: a single green-glowing flag planted firmly in dark soil, alone, vast negative space

images.alt: a single green ember still glowing in a field of cold grey ash
images.scene: a single green ember still glowing warmly in a wide field of cold grey ash, dark

images.scene: a slow green seedling pushing up through dark cracked earth toward a faint distant light

images.scene: a long dark staircase with only the first few steps lit green, the rest fading up into darkness

images.scene: a solid dependable green-lit brick beside a hollow glittering grey fake brick cracking apart, dark background

images.scene: three plain unglamorous green-lit hand tools resting on dark stone, plain and simple

images.scene: a steady line of green-lit stepping stones crossing dark still water, no shortcuts, minimal

images.scene: a green-lit conveyor belt in darkness carrying identical plain neutral blocks, with one warmer hand-finished green block at the end

images.scene: a quiet minimal machine of thin green gears and belts in darkness, one empty seat at the controls

images.scene: a single bright green spark of an idea entering one end of a dark mechanical pipeline that outputs neat ordered shapes

images.scene: a dark minimal chessboard where a single green-lit piece directs the movement of several dim pieces

images.scene: a glowing green task token being handed off from a bright node to a working node across dark space

images.scene: a tall stack of glowing green subscription chips piling up on dark ground, casting long dramatic shadows
